Container.Name: mix-ingest
Container.Overview: Self-hosted DJ-mix ingestion: paste a YouTube / SoundCloud / Mixcloud / 1001tracklists link, get the mix downloaded (no re-encode), tagged, with the tracklist embedded as synced lyrics, filed into a Navidrome library, and a rescan triggered. Note: requires --shm-size=1g (set in Extra Parameters) for the built-in Chromium used on 1001tracklists links.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the web form and ingest API.

Config.Name: Data share
Config.Description: Your music share. Mixes are filed under /data/media/mixes; scratch space under /data/inbox/.mixtmp.

Config.Name: Config folder
Config.Description: Optional: holds extras like a YouTube cookies.txt.

Config.Name: Navidrome URL
Config.Description: Subsonic API base, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:4533. Leave blank to skip the rescan step.

Config.Name: Navidrome user
Config.Description: Navidrome username for the rescan call.

Config.Name: Navidrome password
Config.Description: Navidrome password for the rescan call.

Config.Name: OWNER_UID
Config.Description: UID that filed mixes are chowned to (Unraid default: 99 = nobody).

Config.Name: OWNER_GID
Config.Description: GID that filed mixes are chowned to (Unraid default: 100 = users).

Config.Name: Library root
Config.Description: Where finished mixes are filed (inside the container). Point a Navidrome library at the host side of this path.

Config.Name: Work dir
Config.Description: Scratch space for in-progress downloads. Keep on the same share as the library root.

Config.Name: SoundCloud OAuth
Config.Description: Optional: SoundCloud Go+ OAuth token for 256 kbps AAC.

Config.Name: YouTube cookies
Config.Description: Optional: path to a Netscape cookies.txt (e.g. /config/youtube-cookies.txt) to get past YouTube's bot wall.

Config.Name: FlareSolverr URL
Config.Description: Optional: FlareSolverr endpoint; used instead of the built-in Chromium for 1001tracklists.

Config.Name: Ingest shared secret
Config.Description: Optional: if set, POST /ingest requires header X-Ingest-Secret.
